scope: Chunk 2 - Phase 2 frontend e2e harness fix before browser/LLM validation resumes
root_cause: Playwright default webServer waited for http://localhost:3000 while its command did not force Vite to port 3000. The targeted e2e suite also had stale local-login mocks: sign-in tests submitted credentials but did not mock the current /api/v1/auth/sign-in and /api/v1/auth/me cookie-session flow.
fix_summary: Playwright now derives one baseURL from E2E_BASE_URL or http://localhost:3000.
Default local mode starts Vite with --port 3000 and waits on the same baseURL.
External real-app mode skips webServer when E2E_BASE_URL is set, allowing tests to target the already-running Docker frontend at http://localhost:5173.
The i18n audit e2e helper now uses sanitized network-boundary auth mocks for the current local-login endpoints.

frontend_commands.command: cd frontend && rtk npm run test:e2e -- rtl-snapshots.spec.ts i18n-audit.spec.ts
frontend_commands.summary: Reproduced original failure before fix: Process from config.webServer was not able to start. Exit code: 1.

frontend_commands.command: cd frontend && rtk npm run test:e2e -- rtl-snapshots.spec.ts i18n-audit.spec.ts
frontend_commands.summary: Default local Playwright mode passed: 11 passed.

frontend_commands.command: cd frontend && E2E_BASE_URL=http://localhost:5173 rtk npm run test:e2e -- rtl-snapshots.spec.ts i18n-audit.spec.ts
frontend_commands.summary: External real-app frontend mode passed: 11 passed.

frontend_commands.command: cd frontend && rtk npm run lint
cd frontend && rtk npm run typecheck
cd frontend && rtk npm run build
frontend_commands.summary: Production build passed; Vite emitted the existing large chunk warning.

frontend_commands.command: cd frontend && rtk npm run lint:css

browser_flows.evidence: Explicitly out of scope for this harness-fix run; can resume after merge.

security_privacy.notes: Evidence stores command summaries and paths only. E2E auth data is sanitized mock data, not credentials.
